caption: Did you know that 80% of women experience weight gain after 40? 🤯 It's not just about metabolism slowing down. Here are 4 key reasons: hormonal changes 🌟, decreased muscle mass 🏋️‍♀️, poor sleep patterns 😴, and stress. 💆‍♀️ Save this so you don't lose it. Share with someone who needs to see this. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future body will thank you. 🌟 #weightgain #womenover40 #hormones #healthyliving #weightloss #metabolism #midlifehealth #menopause
